courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Tutorial Without Text
genericDescription: Teach through spatial arrangement; introduce one concept at a time; verify comprehension through player action.
specificDescription: Build a level that teaches a mechanic without tutorial text, voiceover, or pop-up instructions. Use gating, repetition, framing, and consequence to teach.
gradingRubric: 30 pts nonverbal teaching; 20 pts pacing; 20 pts completion clarity; 15 pts playtest observation; 15 pts polish.
